vllm.title: [Misc][Breaking] Change FP8 checkpoint format from act_scale -> input_scale
vllm.author: mgoin
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
In tandem with neuralmagic/AutoFP8#11.
BREAKING CHANGE: Because there can be input and output scales (kv_scale is an example of an "output" scale for k_proj+v_proj), the current usage of act_scale is quite vague. We would like to be explicit here to properly support future formats, so we are proposi

vllm.title: [Core][CUDA Graph] add output buffer for cudagraph to reduce memory footprint
vllm.author: youkaichao
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Currently, each cudagraph for one batch size will incur additional memory cost of TP * BATCH_SIZE * HIDDEN_SIZE . Then the total memory footprint for all cudagraphs are TP * SUM(BATCH_SIZES) * HIDDEN_SIZE.
If we create output buffer too, the total memory footprint for all cudagraphs are TP * MAX(BAT

vllm.title: [mis][ci/test] fix flaky test in tests/test_sharded_state_loader.py
vllm.author: youkaichao
vllm.bodyExcerpt: This flaky test is observed in https://buildkite.com/vllm/ci/builds/9517#018ff9e8-1c4b-4fac-b3c5-af50946523d8 . torch.empty tensor can contain NaN values.
